name: RSFeatureSet
what_it_solves: Layer-0 Pydantic/dataclass contract carried by every engine boundary that references RSFeatureSet.
how_it_solves: Fields (canonical set): ['CCNE1_amplified', 'ARID1A_LOF', 'MYC_amplified', 'MSI_H', 'TP53_LOF', 'MBD4_LOF', 'rs_score', 'rs_class']. See CRISPRO_SL_PHD_ROADMAP.txt Ch 3.2 for the exact schema.
why_it_exists: 6 binary features + composite RS score; single point of truth for replication-stress phenotyping.
